TO SET MOT TO W/DRAW G PLEA FILED

/CAL:TO SET MOTION/DEF:WAIVES ANY CONFLICT ISSUES WITH THE CRIME LAB AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORED/X:PEOPLE AND DEFENDANT WAIVE ANY CONFLICT ISSUES ASSET FORTH ON THE RECORD/CTORD:PROBATION IN #10000455 IS HEREBY TERMINATEDAS SUCCESSFUL/
/AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ 1Y/CTS:49/DNACOMP/PF500/WS/11590/DTC/LF/RX/VF4:200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEE/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:THE DEFENDANT IS ELIGIBLE FOR CTS PURSUANT TO 4019PC/
/X:PRELIMINARY HRG/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:   1/IBARRA/ARBUCKLE/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES: 02-22-10/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LD:01-22-10/987,2/BAIL:35000 /CONTD:DEPT 11 TO SET/CONTD SPR ELIG REPORT, DOP/CONTD:FOR SPR ELIGIBILITY REPORT/ CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL: TS MTN/CONTD: 10-15-10, D23, TS MTN TO WDRAW/

/NP/X:PD ARMANDO AND ADA JOHN ULLOM WAIVE ANY CONFLICT WITH JUDGE BREALL//CAL: MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/CONT/
/CAL: SPR  ELIGIBILITY REPORT/X:RELEASE ON  SPR  IS DENIED/X:PRELIMINARYHEARING DATE OF 01-21-10 IS CONFIRMED/NTW/LD:01-22-10/DOP/
